action.reasoning: Observation: All previous iterations failed with ChildFailedError because train.py was truncated (incomplete file). Analysis: Need to write the complete train.py with DDP, robust data loading, class weights, validation macro-F1, logging to metrics.jsonl, and mixed precision. Decision: Write full train.py, run on 5% data for 2 epochs to validate pipeline, then submit eval in the same iteration. This will give us a baseline score and accurate iteration time measurement. Also, the model will be a CLIP ViT-B/16 fine-tuned end-to-end with class-weighted cross-entropy.
